name: Belly 12x12 Horse Paddock Plan - An Open Shelter for Safe, Functional Equine Care
open_features: The single-slope roof design provides dependable rain runoff and shade coverage while keeping the structure visually clean and functional.
Partial slatted walls offer airflow, visibility, and safety while allowing horses to move freely and comfortably.
Straightforward framing, standard lumber sizing, and easy-to-follow plans make this paddock suitable for DIY builders and farm owners alike.
Natural wood construction with clean lines creates a practical yet attractive paddock that complements barns, fencing, and pasture landscapes.
description_summary: Kickstart your next pasture or property upgrade with the Belly Horse Paddock Plan - a 12x12 open-air paddock shelter designed for durability, airflow, and everyday equine comfort. Featuring a sturdy sloped roof, open-sided layout with horizontal rail fencing, and a clean timber structure, Belly delivers reliable weather protection while maintaining excellent visibility and ventilation for horses.
